auth.loginDescription: Use your account to enter the tool workbench.
auth.loginFailed: The account or password is incorrect, or the auth service is temporarily unavailable.
auth.logoutFailed: Sign-out was not fully completed. Refresh the page to confirm the state.
auth.sessionFailed: The sign-in state could not be confirmed. Try again later.

workbench.title: HDX Tool Workbench
workbench.description: Manage tools, runtime status, and local integration boundaries in one place.
workbench.unavailable: Backend is unavailable, showing the local workbench shell.
workbench.loadFailed: Workbench data could not be loaded.
